item.title: A football stat scraper
item.description: Motivations I have often wanted to have a statistics dataset of football matches to be able to apply my statistics courses in a domain that I appreciate and not on the datasets provided by software like R or Python (mpg, iris, .. .). The first solution I considered was to look for a database or an opensource API containing this type of data. I found several but none satisfied me (size insufficient, not free, …).

item.title: About
item.description: Hi there I’m Amaury Lekens and this website presents my personal projects in data science, machine learning, robotics, …. This website is powered by Hugo and use the theme terminal by panr. Site is hosted on github.io
